other_observers: found October 5 by Kaye Lafreniere and ingrid Huskey
description: The heron was easily found in the location reported previously by Kaye Lafreniere, Ingrid Huskey, and Mark Peterson -- the small pond along Birdsall Road.  It was moving around slowly and silently, apparently foraging in the pond, during the period I observed it.  Some of the important features for identification are:  (1) transitional plumage with relatively light crown stripe and cheek patches starting to appear, (2) a mix of light and dark gray on the bill, (3) a long neck, and (4) thin, white edges on the covert feathers.
photographer: Photographer: David Dowell, David Dowell, David Dowell, David Dowell
